candidate_output.email_subject: Request: 18 open engineering roles — can we help?
candidate_output.email_body:
Hi Elena,

I see you have 18 open engineering roles — that's significant velocity for a team at your stage post-Series B. We help recently-funded teams like yours staff engineers rapidly.

Would 15 minutes work this week?

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com

ground_truth.expected_behavior: Playwright redirected to breezy.hr (known ATS). Confidence must be downgraded to 0.6 and email must hedge: 'I noticed a number of engineering roles on your careers page' rather than citing the exact inflated count.

dimensions.name: confidence_aware_phrasing
dimensions.description: Use 'a number of' not exact count

candidate_output.email_subject: Request: 15 minutes on your Series A engineering hiring
candidate_output.email_body:
Hi Liam,

You closed your Series A in the last quarter and have 5 open engineering roles. The challenge at this stage is recruiting velocity — finding engineers quickly while maintaining technical quality. We help Series A teams staff Python, Go, data, and ML engineers managed under Tenacious project management. Our engineers have minimum three hours of synchronous overlap. We can supplement your full-time search while you continue hiring. We have placed engineers at teams similar to yours and the results have been excellent. Also additionally additionally additionally additionally Also additionally additionally additionally additionally Also additionally additionally additionally additionally Also additionally additionall

Would 15 minutes work this week?

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com

dimensions.description: Hard limit: 120 words for cold outreach
